'''thasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaguely|vaguely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaguely|vaguely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thasate|thasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thasatesher|thasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasatesherĂ«m|thasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thasatero|thasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thasateshĂ«|thasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasateshĂ«m|thasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithasatero|gokithasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithasateshĂ«|gokithasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithasateshĂ«m|gokithasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothasankerom|gothasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothasankeshĂ«|gothasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothasankeshĂ«m|gothasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothasankeya|gothasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thasaterom|thasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasatemu|thasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thasateya|thasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithasaterom|gokithasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithasatemu|gokithasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithasateya|gokithasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thasasate|thasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thasasatesher|thasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasasatesherĂ«m|thasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thasasatero|thasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thasasateshĂ«|thasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasasateshĂ«m|thasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithasasatero|gokithasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithasasateshĂ«|gokithasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithasasateshĂ«m|gokithasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothasasankerom|gothasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothasasankeshĂ«|gothasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothasasankeshĂ«m|gothasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothasasankeya|gothasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thasasaterom|thasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasasatemu|thasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thasasateya|thasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithasasaterom|gokithasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithasasatemu|gokithasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithasasateya|gokithasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠte|thĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠtesher|thĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠtero|thĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠsĂŠtero|gokithĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠterom|thĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠtemu|thĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠsĂŠteya|thĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠsĂŠterom|gokithĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠsĂŠteya|gokithĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafsafte|thafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafsaftesher|thafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafsaftesherĂ«m|thafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafsaftero|thafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafsafteshĂ«|thafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafsafteshĂ«m|thafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafsaftero|gokithafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafsafteshĂ«|gokithafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafsafteshĂ«m|gokithafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafsafnkerom|gothafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafsafnkeshĂ«|gothafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafsafnkeshĂ«m|gothafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafsafnkeya|gothafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafsafterom|thafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafsaftemu|thafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafsafteya|thafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafsafterom|gokithafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafsaftemu|gokithafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafsafteya|gokithafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
